item.title: Russia killed opposition leader with frog poison, 5 European countries say
item.description: Russian opposition leader Alexei Navalny was "highly likely" killed in 2024 by a toxin found in poison dart frogs, five European nations said in a sta...

item.title: U.S., Iran to hold new round of nuclear talks in Geneva this week, Swiss government says
item.description: Iran and the United States will hold a second round of talks over Tehran's nuclear program next week, the Swiss Foreign Ministry said Saturday.

item.title: The $31 million question: Are Trump's settlements actually changing journalism?
item.description: Two major media outlets have paid President Trump tens of millions to settle defamation lawsuits, but the expensive capitulations have produced only m...

item.title: Iran's crown prince says survival of Tehran government 'sends a clear signal to every bully'
item.description: Some 200,000 people demonstrated Saturday against Iran's government on the sidelines of a gathering of world leaders in Germany, police said, answerin...

item.title: Stephen A. Smith teases 2028 presidential run
item.description: Sports commentator Stephen A. Smith said he is not ruling out a 2028 presidential campaign.
